item.title: paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 18s This might've been harsh on trees. Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 7 mar. Liam Delap plays
item.description: Paddy Power @paddypower · 18s This might've been harsh on trees. Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 7 mar. Liam Delap plays like a tree that was reincarnated as a human. 1 216

item.description: Paddy Power @paddypower · 20min Alejandro Garnacho has achieved the unique position of being disliked by both sets of fans in a stadium. Impressive work. 2 12 120 8 mil
